creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #14)

I understand. I was really asking for personal edification. Sorry if I wasn't clear, I actually run Poudriere and install everything with pkg exclusively, and in this case the repo in question was my local svn testing & patching repo, from which Poudriere built the package, but eventually it was a matter of pkg upgrade which did the reinstall even without PORTEPOCH.

But yeah, I agree, better to force it like that.
